/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -std=c++11 -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest.so -o libgtest.so CMakeFiles/gtest.dir/src/gtest-all.cc.o  -L/workspaces/faster/ws/build/decomp_test_node/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src -Wl,-rpath,/workspaces/faster/ws/build/decomp_test_node/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src -lpthread
